posts.author: omershk (Omer Shkedi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’ve been wondering if someone might have an explanation for this:
I’m using a simple python module to retrieve board data from Monday.
The request I’m sending to https://api.monday.com/v2 is:

query
    {
        boards (ids: SOME-BOARD-ID) {
            id
            name
            permissions
            tags {
              id
              name
            }
            groups {
                id
                title
            }
            columns {
                id
                title
                type
                settings_str
            }
        }
    }

I’m getting all columns except for the one who’s type is board-relation.
Weird thing is that if I paste this query to the API playground I do get this column.
Any idea what causes this?

Thank you in advance.

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @omershk,

I can’t find a board-relation column, do you mean the dependency column?
Maybe I’m just blind, help me out

Greetings

posts.author: omershk (Omer Shkedi)
posts.cookedHtml: Problem disappeared after I generated a new API key.

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: @dipro a customer of mine had a similar problem with a generated token that got a “Not authenticated” error back and once he regenerated it, it worked. It seems like you guys had a problem with your token generation server.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
